svg.text: • Cycle detection — Floyd's tortoise / hare (separate pattern)
• Find middle — fast jumps two, slow jumps one
• k-th from end — fast moves k ahead, then both move together
• Merge two sorted — splice smaller head into result tail
• Reverse — prev / curr / next iteration (separate pattern)
• Reorder — split, reverse second half, merge alternating
Adds prev pointer ⟹ O(1) deletion given a node reference.
Backbone of LRU cache (146), LFU cache (460), browser history.
Cost: 2x pointer storage; surgery is symmetric:
insert_after(p, n): n.prev = p; n.next = p.next; p.next.prev = n; p.next = n
Use sentinels (head, tail) to remove null-checks at boundaries.
